title: viola granulosa
intro: Viola granulosa, also known as Chinese pimpernel, is a plant species belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). The medicinal properties of Viola granulosa are attributed to its root, which has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola granulosa include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Viola granulosa root can be processed into a powder or decoction for oral consumption, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
